change_summary: Added a Gemini CLI Validator-B runner.
Added Validator-B audit and handoff fixture coverage.
Recorded local validation evidence for Validator-A environments that cannot execute node/npm.
self_review: Dry-run mode should validate the handoff without invoking Gemini.
Live execution requires Gemini CLI installation and authentication.

log.result: Synthetic Generator result used only for Validator-B runner dry-run validation.
Local node --check, Validator-B dry-run, npm run audit:harness, and git diff --check passed; details stored in validation-evidence.json.
